header.title: Your best corporate assistant, available 24/7
header.description: Ask Sttok AI what you'd ask your best assistant: data, documents, reports and calculations on your company's corporate matters. Answers in seconds, without leaving the platform.

guardrails.title: Data in Europe
guardrails.description: Sttok runs on AWS Europe. Your data never leaves the EU.

guardrails.title: No cross-training
guardrails.description: Your company data is isolated. It's never reused or used to train external models.

guardrails.title: Certified compliance
guardrails.description: Compliant with GDPR, EU AI Act and ISO 27001.

guardrails.title: Auditable answers
guardrails.description: Every AI output is reviewable and logged for audit.

examples.prompt: Give me the list of shareholders for next month's meeting with their percentages and emails.
examples.result: Table with all 11 shareholders, %ND, %FD and contact data, ready to convene.

examples.prompt: Draft the minutes for today's accounts approval meeting with the voted resolutions.
examples.result: Complete minutes with quorum, attendees, resolutions and voting results.

examples.prompt: Prepare the paperwork for a €2M capital increase at €18M pre-money valuation.
examples.result: Notice, dilution sheet, certificate and resolution ready for signature.

examples.prompt: Calculate the issue premium and numbering for this capital increase.
examples.result: Premium per share, par value, numbering range and total to be paid in.
